sd-cf-descriptionlist-description-not-in.description: <DescriptionListDescription> must be inside DescriptionListTerm or DescriptionListTermHelpText, not directly in <DescriptionListGroup>

incidents.message:
<DescriptionListDescription> should be wrapped in DescriptionListTerm or DescriptionListTermHelpText inside <DescriptionListGroup>.

Replace:
  <DescriptionListGroup>
    <DescriptionListDescription />
  </DescriptionListGroup>

With (either):
  <DescriptionListGroup>
    <DescriptionListTerm>
      <DescriptionListDescription />
    </DescriptionListTerm>
  </DescriptionListGroup>
  or
  <DescriptionListGroup>
    <DescriptionListTermHelpText>
      <DescriptionListDescription />
    </DescriptionListTermHelpText>
  </DescriptionListGroup>

<DescriptionList> must contain at least one DescriptionListGroup child component.

Correct usage:
  <DescriptionList>
    <DescriptionListGroup />
  </DescriptionList>

sd-css-removed-select.description: CSS component class 'pf-c-select' was removed in PF v6

incidents.message:
This CSS references the 'pf-c-select' component class which was removed in PatternFly v6.

The Select component was rebuilt and no longer uses this CSS class. This CSS override is dead and should be removed.

Check if the behavior you were overriding is now available via a component prop instead.

The `title` prop has been removed from <Modal>.

After:

    <ModalHeader title={value} />
    ...
  </Modal>

MIGRATION: <SelectOptionObject> was removed.

This component has no detected direct replacement.
Replace all <SelectOptionObject> usages with the recommended alternative.

Remove SelectOptionObject from the import statement.This type was part of the deprecated Select API.
The new Select is in '@patternfly/react-core' and uses a composition-based structure:

  <Select>
    <SelectList />
    <Select />
    <SelectOption />
    <SelectGroup />
  </Select>

The SelectOptionObject interface was removed and has no direct replacement.
